item.title: Version 1.0.14-dev.2
item.sparkle:releaseNotes:
• release: windows v1.0.14-dev.2
  • Merge branch 'dev' of github.com:vavilov2212/worklog_studio into dev
  • docs: keep standing operational rules in CLAUDE.md, POST_MORTEM.md is session experience only
  • docs: distill Reports page session into POST_MORTEM, clean up CLAUDE.md entry point
  • fix(reports): remove breakdown bar, add table row dividers, fix table height, collapse groups by default
  • fix(reports): align _TotalRow columns with WsGroupedTable header layout
  • fix(reports): inline color lookup to remove sub-path style system import
  • feat(reports): implement ReportsSummaryPanel, ReportsTable, and full ReportsPage
  • feat(reports): wire navigation and provide ReportsBloc at app level
  • fix(ui-kit): add key to _GroupRow and fix _groupsUnchanged builder
  • feat(ui-kit): add WsGroupedTable generic hierarchical table widget
  • feat(reports): add ReportsBloc with period state and TDD tests
  • fix(reports): add l10n comments to month labels and use arrow separator
  • feat(reports): add ReportsAggregator with data models and TDD tests
  • docs: fix cross-feature dependencies in reports spec
  • docs: add Reports page design spec
